product: Genie Space enhancements and bug fixes
tagline: Create API instruction limits raised: The create API now enforces the same limits as the UI for instruction creation.
what_it_does: Create API instruction limits raised: The create API now enforces the same limits as the UI for instruction creation. The maximum characters for query text has been raised from 20,000 to 40,000. Answer now in Agent mode (Public Preview): Users can click Answer now to stop Agent mode reasoning and get an answer based on the existing context.
why_it_matters: Use benchmarks to score response accuracy at scale.

key_takeaway: Create API instruction limits raised: The create API now enforces the same limits as the UI for instruction creation.
